title: Ignore Rules, Attributes, Line Endings, and Repository Content · Spiral Review
summary: Keep generated output, local configuration, binaries, and secrets out of history while preserving cross-platform text behavior. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a content-boundary and normalization policy after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Trace ignore sources, directory scope, pattern grammar, negation, tracked-state limits, and check-ignore evidence.
Choose repository ignore, info/exclude, and global excludes from whether a rule belongs to every collaborator or one environment.
Use attributes for text normalization, diff, merge, export, and binary behavior with check-attr evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# git-basics cumulative repository evidence notebook
# Git operations change only disposable simulated repository state.
# Inspect status, diffs, graph, refs, and recovery before every mutation.

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence
steps.instruction:
review case — Repository tracks config.local, build/app.bin, and CRLF script check.sh; .gitignore is added afterward. Decide tracked cleanup, attribute normalization, secret rotation, and changed-platform evidence. Competency probe: Prevent and respond to secrets, large binaries, generated artifacts, and sensitive history with policy and rotation boundaries.

Inspect the Secret Large Generated Data trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for prevent and respond to secrets, large binaries, generated artifacts, and sensitive history with policy and rotation boundaries.
